/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/bmp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/filter_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/pipeline_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/src/filters.cpp.o -o unit_tests
